untranslatable_reason: Signal requires decile-based portfolio ranking and relative volatility comparison across universe of stocks. The allowed indicators list contains only single-stock technical metrics (hvol_20 for historical volatility). Decile construction requires: (1) calculating volatility for all stocks in universe, (2) ranking them, (3) selecting bottom decile. This is a cross-sectional portfolio construction rule, not a time-series technical indicator rule suitable for single-stock backtesting. hvol_20 exists but cannot operationalize 'lowest decile' without universe-wide ranking logic absent from the indicator set.
translation_notes: Signal SSRN_980865_2 is a Fama-French style factor research rule designed for academic portfolio studies (1986-2006 period, 12% annual alpha spread). It requires: (1) decile-based sorting across stock universe by volatility, (2) long low-vol / short high-vol construction, (3) periodic rebalancing. Modern backtest engines need explicit decile ranking functions or percentile indicators. The entry condition 'lowest volatility decile (decile 1)' cannot be expressed as a direct comparison of single-stock indicators. Recommend: either mark untranslatable, or extend indicator set to include percentile_rank_hvol_20 or similar.
